description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named ptf-ebpf that runs on push to main, pull requests to main, and merge groups to main. The workflow should use a ubuntu-22.04 job with specific environment variables and cancel any in-progress runs on non-main branches. Check out the repository with submodules, use ccache with a specific key and max size, build using a script, and run PTF tests for the eBPF backend.
